---
title: "Localisation of Biomarkers"
---

Here we are investigating the subcellular localization patterns of biomarkers across different types of leukemia, with a focus on how protein expression levels affect these patterns.

Tool used for protein localisation annotations:
José Juan Almagro Armenteros, Casper Kaae Sønderby, Søren Kaae Sønderby, Henrik Nielsen, Ole Winther, DeepLoc: prediction of protein subcellular localization using deep learning, Bioinformatics, Volume 33, Issue 21, November 012017, Pages 3387–3395, https://doi.org/10.1093/bioinformatics/btx431

Aim: 
Classification by expression level 
1. We are categorizing biomarkers as "Increased" or "Decreased" based on their Log2 fold change values (≥1.5 threshold)
2. For subcellular localization mapping, we are analyzing where these biomarkers are located within cells across 10 different cellular compartments (cytoplasm, nucleus, cell membrane, mitochondria, etc.)
3. Creating stacked bar charts that show the proportion of biomarkers found in each cellular compartment, stratified by both leukemia type and expression level.

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggsignif)
library(tidyverse)

df <-read.csv('../data/curated/annotated_biomarkers.csv')

# Print initial data size
print(paste("Initial data size:", nrow(df)))

# Filter based on adjusted p-values and Log2FC threshold
df <- df %>%
  filter(adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(Log2FC) >= 1.5) %>%
  # Add NPX-based classification
  mutate(NPX_Level = ifelse(Log2FC >= 1.5, "Increased", "Decreased"))

# Print filtered data size
print(paste("After filtering (adj.P.Val < 0.05 & abs(Log2FC) >= 1.5):", nrow(df)))

# Print counts by leukemia type and expression level
count_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(leukemia_type, NPX_Level) %>%
  summarise(count = n(), .groups = 'drop') %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = NPX_Level, values_from = count, values_fill = 0) %>%
  mutate(Total = Increased + Decreased)

print("Counts by leukemia type and expression level:")
print(count_summary)

# Create localization analysis with both leukemia groups and NPX levels
localisation_analysis <- df %>%
  select(leukemia_type, NPX_Level, Cytoplasm, Extracellular, Lysosome.Vacuole, Nucleus, 
         Cell_membrane, Endoplasmic_reticulum, Mitochondrion, Golgi_apparatus, 
         Peroxisome, Plastid) %>%
  pivot_longer(., cols = c(Cytoplasm, Extracellular, Lysosome.Vacuole, Nucleus, 
                          Cell_membrane, Endoplasmic_reticulum, Mitochondrion, 
                          Golgi_apparatus, Peroxisome, Plastid), 
               names_to = "Localisation", values_to = "Fraction") %>%
  # Clean up localization names for better legend readability
  mutate(Localisation = case_when(
    Localisation == "Cell_membrane" ~ "Cell membrane",
    Localisation == "Endoplasmic_reticulum" ~ "Endoplasmic reticulum", 
    Localisation == "Lysosome.Vacuole" ~ "Lysosome/Vacuole",
    Localisation == "Golgi_apparatus" ~ "Golgi apparatus",
    TRUE ~ Localisation  # Keep other names as they are
  )) %>%
  # Reorder leukemia types as requested: BCP-ALL, AML, T-ALL, Leukemia
  mutate(leukemia_type = factor(leukemia_type, 
                               levels = c("BCP-ALL", "AML", "T-ALL", "leukemia"),
                               labels = c("BCP-ALL", "AML", "T-ALL", "Leukemia")))

# Localization plots split by NPX levels, with leukemia types on x-axis
localisation_plot_npx_leukemia <- ggplot(localisation_analysis, 
                                        aes(fill=Localisation, y=Fraction, x=leukemia_type)) + 
    geom_bar(position="fill", stat="identity") + 
    facet_wrap(~NPX_Level, ncol = 2) +
    ylab("Cellular localisation fraction") + 
    xlab("") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(legend.position = "bottom",
          strip.text = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
          axis.text.x = element_text(angle =30, hjust = 1))

localisation_plot_npx_leukemia
ggsave(localisation_plot_npx_leukemia, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, 
       filename = "../figures/protein_localisation_npx_leukemia.png")
ggsave(localisation_plot_npx_leukemia, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 300, 
       filename = "../figures/protein_localisation_npx_leukemia.pdf")
```
